name: wode-gf-cli
description: CLI for exporting and managing Grafana resources

scripts.install:bin: pnpm run build && rm -f "$HOME/bin/wode-gf-cli" "$HOME/.local/bin/wode-gf-cli" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && cp dist/wode-gf-cli.js "$HOME/.local/bin/wode-gf-cli" && chmod +x "$HOME/.local/bin/wode-gf-cli"
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run build
